subject: The Persecution of Christians is Still With Us Today
body:
The Persecution of Christians is Still With Us Today No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Persecution of Christians is Still With Us Today](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-j/)
We tend to think persecuting Christians is something that happened 2000 years ago. But the fact is, it's still going on in some parts of the world to this day. I'm on the blog talking about it today. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Are the Democrats Going to Take Back the House This Fall?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Washington political pundits (virtually all liberals) have been predicting a Democrat takeover for a while now. The most recent to join the chorus is Larry Sabato of the University of Virginia's Center for Politics. He now says Democrats are "soft favorites" to take over the House of Representatives. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Trump and Putin in Helsinki](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-u/)
This week on the blog I'm discussing President Trump's meeting in Helsinki with Russian President Vladimir Putin as well as breaking down President Trump's comments following. Click below to read more.
[Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Is Roe Finally Gonna Go?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjyutyjl-kujkulhluu-n/)
Monday night President Trump selected Judge Brett Kavanaugh to replace Anthony Kennedy on the U.S. Supreme Court. I think this was an excellent pick. And it brings up the discussion, is there a potential for Roe to be overturned? I'm talking about it in this week's blog. Click below to read more.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: This Political Fight Will Go Many More Rounds
body:
Dear Friend,

Below are my thoughts on the continuous political fight and division in our country. I hope you are able to read it over.
Bobby

* * *
**This Political Fight Will Go Many More Rounds**
_Even if Trump retired quietly to Mar-a-Lago, a return to civility would be highly unlikely._

The Wall Street Journal
Bobby Jindal
Someday soon, many Democrats think, America will wake up from the Trump nightmare and return to normalcy. Donald Trump, they hope, will prove to be not a new normal but an unfortunate aberration. They’re probably wrong.

Democracy tends to give us the government we deserve. Bill Clinton wasn’t responsible for the rotting of personal morality; he reflected what was already there. Similarly, Mr. Trump did not create the polarization and politicization of everyday life; he’s simply great at riding a wave that was already coming ashore. Mr. Trump’s passing from the national scene will not automatically usher in a new era of comity and harmony.

**[Read more...](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=7652&l=203&ctl=1D835:C15079EF2606CA7C5104955827C6F80B696548644412C47B&)**

* * *

The White House • August 2, 2018
# On ICE, Democrats abandon the mainstream
**Despite public opposition** , numerous Democrats continue to call for U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) to be abolished. It’s a belief that falls squarely outside the American mainstream: According to a recent [**POLITICO/Morning Consult poll**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAyLjkzMjY0OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMi45MzI2NDkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYzNjkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/politico-voters-oppose-abolishing-ice/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d), only 25 percent of voters support getting rid of ICE. **A majority of Americans** know we must keep ICE, and for good reason: Eliminating this crucial piece of our national security force would grind immigration enforcement to a halt, with devastating consequences for public safety. Abolishing ICE would mean abolishing the agency responsible for removing drug dealers, gang members, and other criminals who exploit America’s border to take advantage of our communities. **The numbers don’t lie.** Criminals arrested by ICE during the 2017 fiscal year were responsible for:
> • More than 76,000 dangerous drug offenses;
> • More than 48,000 assault offenses;
> • More than 11,000 weapon offenses;
> • More than 5,000 sexual assault offenses;
> • More than 2,000 kidnapping offenses; and
> • More than 1,800 homicide offenses.
**Our immigration law enforcement officers** work in dangerous conditions to protect our communities. We must stand with them. Recently, 167 Democrats in the House of Representatives refused to vote for a resolution to support these border officials. “To the courageous public servants at ICE, men and women, we want you to know that the American people are with you and my administration has your back 100 percent,” President Trump said in his most recent weekly address. [**Watch President Trump’s weekly address on immigration enforcement.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAyLjkzMjY0OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMi45MzI2NDkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYzNjkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d-aqhI5YuBE) **The facts:** [**Abolishing ICE would open the floodgates—to crime, drugs, and terrorism**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAyLjkzMjY0OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMi45MzI2NDkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYzNjkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/abolishing-ice-erase-americas-borders-open-floodgates-crime-drugs-terrorism/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# Moving video: Vice President welcomes home fallen American soldiers from the Korean War
**Yesterday in Hawaii** , the remains of 55 U.S. Service Members were returned to American soil. Vice President Mike Pence traveled to Honolulu to welcome them home. **The return comes** as part of President Trump’s negotiations with North Korean leader Kim Jong-Un. The President thanked Chairman Kim for honoring his word. “Incredibly beautiful ceremony as U.S. Korean War remains are returned to American soil,” the President tweeted. “Thank you to Honolulu and all of our great Military participants on a job well done.” **“Some have called the Korean War** the ‘forgotten war.’ But today, we prove these heroes were never forgotten,” Vice President Pence said. “Today, our boys are coming home.” **[Watch Vice President Pence’s tribute to these fallen American heroes.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAyLjkzMjY0OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMi45MzI2NDkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYzNjkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-0FuZ-AsbZs)** **More:** **[The Korean War heroes who “didn’t get to come home”](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODAyLjkzMjY0OTAxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwMi45MzI2NDkwMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYzNjkxJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/remarks-vice-president-pence-honorable-carry-ceremony/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**

name: Senator Amy Klobuchar
subject: Your thoughts on election security?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hello,

The Senate Intelligence Committee has released a bipartisan report that affirmed what U.S. intelligence agencies already told us: **Russia cyberattacked our 2016 elections.** Electronic voting machines in as many as 21 states may have been targeted by Russian hackers.

Now the question is, what are we going to do about it? The midterm elections are less than four months away!

Fair elections are the basis of our democracy. That's why I've introduced bipartisan legislation to safeguard U.S. election infrastructure from foreign interference.

**But I want to hear your take on why this issue is important.[Will you take a moment to let me know your thoughts about election security?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=YkXxeUbSGaxqaHaOTfFNOJGAaHOmyLJ2)**

name: Colleen
subject: I saw Hamilton with Sherrod
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- I'm Colleen, and last week, I won Team Sherrod's contest to see a performance of _Hamilton_ with the Senator! I won't lie: Before the show on Sunday, I was nervous. I was a little intimidated by the thought of meeting Sherrod, who works so hard to support programs that make a big difference in my neighborhood. Within the first few moments of meeting him, though, I was put at ease. He listened intently as my husband and I shared our stories. He asked us questions, and made sure he heard our answers. [**I was struck by how genuine Sherrod is. He sincerely cares about families like mine, and that 's reflected in the work he does every day in the Senate. I hope you'll consider pitching in to support him this fall.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff850/4462dc26/6863bd33/200764bc/1813570134/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwODAyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180802?refcode=sbe180802_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff850/4462dc26/6863bd33/200764b3/1813570134/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwODAyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180802?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180802_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff850/4462dc26/6863bd33/200764b3/1813570134/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwODAyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180802?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180802_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff850/4462dc26/6863bd33/200764b3/1813570134/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwODAyIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180802?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180802_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff850/4462dc26/6863bd33/200764bc/1813570134/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwODAyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180802?refcode=sbe180802_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** _Hamilton_ , of course, was amazing. But I couldn't shake the concern that we are currently in a fight for the very soul of the country that Hamilton envisioned -- all while I was sitting next to the Senator working so hard to protect the progress we've made. We cannot afford to lose this fight. I'm confident that Sherrod will make sure we don't. That's why I'm proud to support him. It's why I'm registering voters, volunteering, and why I'll continue chipping in to the campaign. [**I hope you will, too. Don 't throw away your shot to make a difference this fall -- and to make sure we send Sherrod back to the Senate.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff850/4462dc26/6863bd33/200764bc/1813570134/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwODAyIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180802?refcode=sbe180802_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thank you, Colleen

| | Friends,
Have you heard that the far left organization MoveOn, founded by liberal mega donor George Soros and progressive activists, is focusing its efforts on turning AL-02 blue?

I hope you'll join me in fighting to keep our district red. We must send the clear message that MoveOn's liberal values don’t represent the values of Alabama’s Second District.

subject: Massive momentum -- join the call:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Our volunteer network has accomplished momentous goals in a short amount
of time – but now’s the time to level up our ambition.

With a Senate majority hanging in the balance, the outcome of this
election will impact millions of lives across the country, including in
your state.

The way we’re going to unseat Ted Cruz is by out-organizing the
opposition. That’s why we’re inviting you now to one of our upcoming
organizing calls, where we’ll share key campaign updates and opportunities
for everyone to get involved – even from your city.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/2139?t=1001&akid=2197%2E444211%2ERM4DAK ]Can you join one of our organizing calls? There are many opportunities
to get involved, no matter where you live or how much organizing
experience you’ve got under your belt.

JOIN AN ORGANIZING CALL FOR BETO

We’re running a bold, people-powered campaign to change the future of our
country. But we will only succeed if enough of us take part. We’re going
to have to get bigger and bolder than we’ve ever seen in the state of
Texas, and we’ll need our national network pitching in from afar.

These organizing calls are the first step to find out how you can take
part. If you’ve never volunteered on a campaign before, no sweat. We have
a skilled, welcoming team here to support you every step of the way. We’ll
lay out everything on the calls – so for now, just find a time that works
for you, and we’ll get into the details later:

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/2139?t=1002&akid=2197%2E444211%2ERM4DAK ]Sign up for an organizing call here, and find out how you can be part
of this historic campaign.

If we work hard, and if we do it together, we can forge a new path forward
– away from Ted Cruz’s vision for our country, and toward one where all of
us can succeed.

Thanks for being part of this,

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1031?refcode=em20180802&t=1003&akid=2197%2E444211%2ERM4DAK ]Contribute

subject: Hi Supporter! Join us next Wednesday for an fun evening with friends!

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f2871f0783dd/hi-join-us-next-wednesday-for-an-fun-evening-with-friends?e=ff9d9ff31e)
---
| |
---
| Dear Supporter,

Thank you so much for all your support for our campaign. It’s greatly appreciated and has made a difference!

I’m writing today to ask for your support one last time before the August 14th Primary. Our campaign is organizing a GOTV kick-off event.

This will be an exciting evening with friends, lively discussions and entertainment**. The event will take place on Wednesday, August 8, from 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM, and will be located at The 508 Bar & Restaurant, 508 North First Avenue in Minneapolis, MN 55403. There's plenty of easy parking available.**

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4f5c/24c69fd9/2673a59f9/188522fe/75399198/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFET05N_digital_email_20180802_BasicGovText_inact&source=WQEFET05N_digital_email_20180802_BasicGovText_inact")
---

Peter,

Republicans control the majority of governors' seats in this country: a whopping 33 compared to Democrats' 16.

And just two of those blue seats belong to pro-choice Democratic women.

But that's about to change!

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women flip governors' seats from red to blue and protect the ones we have.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4f5c/24c69fd9/2673a59f9/188522ff/75399198/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180802_email_BasicGovText?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFET05N_digital_email_20180802_BasicGovText_inact&source=WQEFET05N_digital_email_20180802_BasicGovText_inact")**

Governors set the agenda for their states and many have the power to veto legislation, making them our best chance at stopping Republicans' anti-choice attacks at the state level.

Right now, Republicans completely control the state governments in Georgia, Florida, New Hampshire, Kansas, Wisconsin, Michigan, and more.

But we can break up those Republican strongholds by electing **Stacey Abrams** (GA), **Gwen Graham** (FL), **Molly Kelly** (NH), **Laura Kelly** (KS), **Kelda Roys** (WI), and **Gretchen Whitmer** (MI).

We can protect strong Democratic trifectas in Oregon and Rhode Island by re-electing our two pro-choice champions, Govs. **Kate Brown** (OR) and **Gina Raimondo** (RI).

Plus, we can create two new Democratic trifectas in New Mexico and Maine by helping **Michelle Lujan Grisham** (NM) and **Janet Mills** (ME) flip governors' seats.

It could be a historic year for women governors if we give all of these women our strongest support.

**Donate $3 to help change the face of power in the states by electing pro-choice Democratic women governors:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Women-Governors](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4f5c/24c69fd9/2673a59f9/188522f8/75399198/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180802_email_BasicGovText?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectWomenGovern&utm_campaign=WQEFET05N_digital_email_20180802_BasicGovText_inact&source=WQEFET05N_digital_email_20180802_BasicGovText_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

name: Paul Davis
subject: We need someone who will do more than just “fight and win”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UaWXQB7EHWBlD4_tIPmyl-qPm7ZBHJLOpaEHwRmXEvE=/yvy1Hxy1gmoxcLyzdpS2ZtFz6IZIln5ktxCuWyKVEDU=?gpsid=13_36_2570&refcode=em18_180802_PrimAt_fnd_gq_ful_RR_PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180802_PrimAt_fnd_gq_ful_RR_PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Well, it looks like the attacks from the other side are coming before one of them even wins or loses their primary. Earlier today, Steve Watkins released a video where he claimed he knows how to "fight and win," and that he's the only Republican candidate that can beat me.

**Peter, our current members of Congress are too busy fighting each other to get anything done -- so the last thing Kansans need is an Alaskan outsider who 's just in this to "fight and win" with only talk and no action.**

We need, and deserve, a representative who's willing to work with whoever has the best ideas, no matter which side of the aisle they're on, who will find solutions to the shared problems everyday people are facing. Before I launched my campaign, I visited all 25 counties in our district and heard the same message of fear, frustration, and disappointment. We have problems that politicians in Washington D.C. aren't solving.

But I hear you -- and I'm ready to not only fight for you now but in Congress too.

| **Governor Jim Douglas and Lt. Governor Brian Dubie Endorse Governor Phil Scott for Reelection **
Few know more about serving Vermonters than former Governor Jim Douglas and Lt. Governor Brian Dubie. Both served our state with distinction in so many ways, and we are pleased to announce both have endorsed Governor Phil Scott in the upcoming August 14th Republican Primary Election.

**“I know how hard it is to be governor, and I’m impressed with the job Phil Scott has done,” said Governor Douglas. “He’s been a strong leader in his efforts to grow the economy and make Vermont more affordable, and we desperately need him to continue this work in Montpelier. I’m proud to support his bid for reelection and I hope you will too.”

Lt. Governor Dubie added, “We are very fortunate to have a governor who has devoted his time in office fighting for working families. Phil is focused on tackling the affordability crisis facing far too many Vermonters. He is the right person to be leading the charge, and I strongly support his reelection.” **

_The election will take place on August 14th. You can vote now by absentee ballot in the mail, or by visiting your town clerk’s office. _

---

| | I told you earlier about the incredible success of our 100 Days Out Day of Action. We recruited 100 volunteers to contact more than 3,000 voters via phone calls and canvassing. All of you matched that field success by raising $3,400 online. But I've got more good news for you today -- **with your help we were able to knock our $75,000 July goal out of the park!** I'm incredibly grateful and inspired by all of you. It's about bringing people together to get things done for North Carolina families! | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427821/e3b7d3/5c3cdc66/2555023b/2721536049/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180802?refcode=kme180802_m&recurring=true")

A year ago, political pundits thought this district was too tough to flip. They thought our current Congressman was too entrenched in special interests and dirty Washington politics to beat. **Thank you for all the work you've put in.** I can't thank you enough, I really can't. I can't wait to see what we can achieve in these final 95 days.
Kathy

Sykes instructs each executive committee member to respond in writing should they have reason to not be listed as a defendant.

We can do that for you. That's what we can deliver."**_

Last week, the [Sykes campaign announced the appointment of Sonny Wilson as their campaign chair.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=11235bd316&e=9da9b0ca31) [](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=3a93c65284&e=9da9b0ca31) Wilson stepped down from his position with the RNC/GOP last week as a whistleblower [exposing top leadership in MOGOP](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=8340d4b8f7&e=9da9b0ca31) for fraudulently pushing favored establishment candidate Attorney General Josh Hawley.

### Positions and Issues
**Liberty** \- has become a tiny island, challenged by a roaring sea of laws. America has tens of thousands of useless and unneeded laws, regulations, codes, departments and enforcers and all the bureaucrats, budgets, and taxes that go with these laws that impair every American’s freedom without real benefit. We should be weeding out useless laws night and day.

**Immigration -** Out of control. BUILD THE WALL. Pause ALL U.S. immigration for 36 months. Reduce immigration quotas permanently. Eliminate chain migration, anchor baby schemes and social services for illegals. Improve immigrant quality. Require of all immigrants: English language skills, health and strict U.S allegiance. Legals are America’s guests, illegals are America’s trespassers. Enforce E-verify. Prosecute employer violators. America is not a third-world multicultural dumping ground.

**Jobs** go first to American citizens. Maintain responsible wages to eliminate the myth that “there are jobs Americans won’t do.” Stop importing 1.1 million illegals and temporary visa holders each year—these foreign workers displace jobs that 1.1 million jobs America’s youth need and want. Incentivize small business formation by destroying the unnecessary regulatory state. Rebalance all trade deals until they favor America. Train American youth in entrepreneurship. Make small business great again.

**Taxes** America exists because of a long ago American Revolution which started over unjust taxes. We need a second revolution today over taxes. Eliminate America’s tax Gestapo, the IRS. I favor abolition of the IRS and all income based taxes and replacement with a singular national sales tax that is constitutionally capped.

**Military** America has and must preserve the best military in the world. Nuclear madmen and nuclear proliferation and the highest likelihood of nuclear strikes in history are upon us today. China, with four times the population of America, a huge economy and military and conquest ambitions—is a world war threat that we cannot ignore or fail to prepare for. We must cherish and protect our veterans.

**Abortion** I oppose it. Life begins at conception. Life is precious and the work of God.

**Environment** Climate change is normal and natural—it’s called “weather”—and is not manmade. Clean water and air must be protected but “climate change” is a liberal construct made from “junk science” designed to perpetrate the socialist and globalist state. The earth is tough and liberals need to stop projecting their phobias and agendas upon it.

**Guns** I will be the most pro-gun and anti-regulation Senator in U.S. history.

name: NHGOP Press & Communications
subject: Jeff Woodburn
body:
**NHGOP Chair Wayne MacDonald on State Senator Jeff Woodburn**
**For Immediate Release:** August 2, 2018**Contact:** Joe Sweeney, 603-225-9341
Concord - NHGOP Chair Wayne MacDonald released the following statement regarding State Senator Jeff Woodburn:
"I am deeply shocked and outraged by these allegations. As a State Senator and the highest ranking leader of the NH Democratic Party, Senator Woodburn has betrayed the public trust and inflicted serious and lasting harm. He should resign immediately."
"Tonight our thoughts and prayers should be with the victim of these terrible acts. I hope and pray that the victim may now begin the healing process."
"These events, and the preemptive leaks by Democratic officials, also raise serious questions about the entire Democratic Party. How did the Democratic Party know about these charges before the Attorney General’s announcement? How long did Democrats cover these events up? Every Democrat now needs to answer this question: what did you know and when did you know it? All of these questions must be thoroughly investigated, and I have full confidence that the Attorney General’s office will do everything it can to bring this tragic case to a just conclusion." ###

Friend, In less than 2 weeks, we’ll reach the biggest milestone of our campaign: the Republican primary. And I'll be honest with you, friend. I'm worried... After winning the endorsement of the grassroots at the Wisconsin GOP state convention, the National Rifle Association, and support from voters all over our great state, DC special interests are set on trashing my record with personal, baseless attacks. Senator Baldwin herself is already spending out of her own campaign coffers to attack me — showing how desperate she is. These smear tactics have no place in Wisconsin and will only ensure that we re-elect ultraliberal Tammy Baldwin who supports obstruction and the status quo. That's why I have to count on you so much right now to make sure we pull off a victory on August 14. Friend, I know we have what it takes to bring the Wisconsin Way to Washington. I know we are strong enough to change DC politics as usual. And friend, I know we will be motivated, smart, and bold enough to finally fire Senator Baldwin in November. But first, we have to win this primary. We desperately need a proven conservative to stand with President Trump to build the wall, defend the unborn and protect our Constitution. Now that we’re in the homestretch, your support matters more than ever. So what do you say, friend: Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate
